hero.title: Agent enrollment and rotation
hero.body: Manage agent credentials, rotate bootstrap keys, and control access for enrolled workload identities.

table.title: Workspace fleet
table.body: Enrolled agents in this workspace. Use the filters to narrow by status.

enroll.title: Enroll a new agent
enroll.body: Issue a one-time bootstrap API key for a new workload identity. Agent IDs are workspace-scoped.
enroll.displayNameHint: Optional label shown in the operations table.

emptyState.title: No agents enrolled
emptyState.body: No agents have been enrolled in this workspace yet.

confirm.rotateBody: Rotate the API key for {{agentId}}. The previous key will stop working immediately.
confirm.revokeBody: Revoke {{agentId}}. This agent will no longer be able to mint access tokens.

reveal.bootstrapDescription: Store this API key in the agent runtime now. BlindPass will not reveal it again after dismissal.
reveal.replacementDescription: The previous key is now invalid. Store this replacement key before you close the reveal.
